subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! I beseech God that He may raise up souls that are holy, sanctified and luminous in the western regions and northern climes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امة‌اللّه انّی ادعو اللّه ان یبعث نفوساً مقدّسةً منزّهةً نورانیّة فی الأقطار الغربیّة و الأقالیم الشّمالیّة
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @cleanliness and refinement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
